title: subfield separator
text: subfield separator The character that separates items in a Uniface list or subfield. The default separator character is GOLD ;, which is represented. Don't use "... a GOLD ;-separated list" or "GOLD-separated", but "... a list using GOLD ; separators (;)..." Related Links Subfield Separator and Profile Characters Uniface uses part of the reserved area of each meta character set (that is, the first 32 characters plus the last character) to store characters with special meaning within Uniface, such as subfield separators and profile characters.
